vocab.example: I wear a smartwatch because it monitors my heart rate around the clock, even when I'm sleeping.

vocab.word: at the drop of a hat
vocab.meaning: ngay lập tức / không do dự
vocab.example: With a watch on my wrist, I can check the time at the drop of a hat without fumbling for my phone.

vocab.meaning: cuộc đua với thời gian (làm việc khẩn trương)
vocab.example: In my line of work, we are often in a race against time, so having a reliable watch is crucial.
I sometimes find myself glancing at my watch repeatedly when I'm trying to kill time in a waiting room.

vocab.meaning: hiếm khi / năm thì mười họa
vocab.example: I’m not a big fan of accessories, so I only strap on a formal watch once in a blue moon for special events.
Some of the early smartwatches were truly ahead of their time, offering features we now take for granted.

vocab.meaning: thời gian là cốt yếu / vô cùng quan trọng
vocab.example: When I'm commuting, time is of the essence, so I rely on my watch to stay on schedule.

vocab.meaning: trong thời điểm hiện tại / tạm thời
vocab.example: My old watch is broken, so I'm using my phone to check the time for the time being.
I always keep an eye on my watch to make sure I beat the clock and submit my reports early.
Some people think wearing a traditional analog watch is a bit behind the times, but I find it classic.
